name: Corn Nitrogen Application Rain Block
description: Prevents application of nitrogen fertilizers on corn when heavy rain is forecast within 48 hours. Runoff from N-application during rain events causes waterway contamination and total nutrient loss.
response_pass: Conditions met: No heavy rain is forecast and soil temperature is adequate for nitrogen uptake. Nitrogen application is permitted.
response_fail: HARD STOP: Do not apply nitrogen fertilizers when heavy rain is forecast within 48 hours. This causes direct nutrient runoff into waterways and complete fertilizer loss.
